title: epipactis latifolia var. viridans
intro: Epipactis latifolia var. viridans, also known as the green helleborine, is a type of orchid native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Epipactis latifolia var. viridans include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Epipactis latifolia var. viridans can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
